err_password_too_short: Password must be at least 8 characters.
err_registration_closed: Registration is closed. Please contact an admin.
err_generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
registration_closed_hint: New accounts are created by an admin only. Contact your admin to get access.
activate_subtitle: Copy out each word exactly once to unlock it for the flashcard trainer.
activate_mismatch: Not quite - copy it exactly as shown.
activate_done: All words are activated! Head over to the trainer.
trainer_empty: No vocabulary yet. An admin can add words under "Vocabulary".
vocab_underline_hint: Underline the selected text to mark the stressed syllable.
vocab_navi_hint: Select the stressed syllable and click “U”.
vocab_empty: No vocabulary yet. Add the first word using the form.
admin_cannot_delete_last_admin: The last remaining admin cannot be deleted/demoted.
legal_german_only_notice: The legal notice and privacy policy are legally binding in German only.
quellen_intro: This site relies on the following external sources and projects.
quellen_fwew_text: All vocabulary, including translations, is loaded live from the Fwew API (tirea.learnnavi.org), an open Na'vi dictionary project maintained by the Learn Na'vi community.
quellen_community_text: Beginner vocabulary prioritization is based on material from the Learn Na'vi community.
quellen_avatar_text: The Na'vi language, "Avatar", "Pandora", and related image and trademark rights belong to 20th Century Studios / Lightstorm Entertainment. This site is a non-commercial fan project with no affiliation to the rights holders.
danksagung_text: Thanks to Paul Frommer, creator of the Na'vi language, to the Fwew team for the open dictionary API, and to the whole Learn Na'vi community for their learning materials and passion for this language.
cookie_text: This site uses a technically necessary cookie to keep you logged in. Without consent, logging in isn't possible.
cookie_declined_notice: You've declined the technically necessary cookie - login and registration aren't possible as a result.
tour_intro_title: Welcome to the Na'vi Vocab Trainer!
tour_intro_text: A quick tour of the main features - you can skip it anytime or restart it later from your profile.
tour_activate_text: Before a word shows up in the trainer, copy it out exactly once here - that unlocks it.
tour_trainer_text: Flashcards using the Leitner system: correct answers push a card further ahead, wrong ones send it back to the start. You'll see how many words are due today here, and can choose to review only due cards or your entire activated vocabulary.
tour_progress_text: See your learning progress in detail here - per word and direction.
tour_admin_text: As an admin, you manage users here and decide which words get prioritized in the trainer.
tour_lang_text: Switch the interface language here - it also determines which translation is shown in the trainer.
tour_outro_text: You can always find this tour again under Profile → Restart welcome tour.
grammar_empty: No exercises in this module yet.
grammar_infix_drag_hint: Drag the infix into the correct gap.
grammar_suffix_hint: For each gap, mark the word stem and the suffix to cut off - the fill-in-the-blank sentence is generated from this automatically.
grammar_lenition_hint: The consonant rule is applied automatically - confirm or correct the suggested result before saving.
grammar_mine_empty: No exercises of your own yet.
tour_vokabeltrainer_text: Find both here: activate vocabulary (copy it out once to unlock it) and the flashcard trainer using the Leitner system.
tour_grammatik_text: Practice infix placement, ergative/accusative suffixes, and lenition. As a creator or reviewer, you'll also find "Create exercise" and "Review" here.
tour_profil_text: Change your name and password here, and see your complete learning progress.
profile_export_hint: Download a complete overview of all data stored about you (right of access under Art. 15 GDPR).
profile_delete_hint: Permanently deletes your account, your vocabulary progress, and your grammar answer history. Exercises you created that have already been approved remain as community content.
profile_delete_confirm: Are you sure? This action cannot be undone.
grammar_creator_notice: Thank you for contributing to the community! Once approved, your exercises become a permanent part of the platform and remain so even if you later delete your account. When approved, you'll also be credited once on the Acknowledgments page.
willkommen_subtitle: Learn Na'vi with flashcards and build your grammar skills with real, human-made exercises.
willkommen_intro_text: The vocabulary trainer shows you Na'vi words live from the official Fwew dictionary and helps you retain them with a flashcard system. The grammar toolkit goes a step further: practice infix placement, ergative/accusative suffixes, and lenition with concrete exercises.
willkommen_community_text: The grammar exercises aren't generated automatically - they're created by community members and reviewed by others under a four-eyes principle before going live, deliberately without any generative AI. This platform grows exactly as fast and as richly as the community brings it to life.
willkommen_community_cta: See who has contributed on the acknowledgements page →
profile_navi_name_hint: Optional. Stored alongside your real name and can be used in the credits page.
profile_credit_pref_label: Show my name in the credits as:
err_navi_name_taken: This Na'vi name is already taken.
